rationale: The "POV: rushed home to play X" hook is a generic UGC template that could be reskinned, but this specific centroid explicitly names a competitor (Tetris Block Party) and shows zero gameplay — none of Crowd City's swarming/chasing visual payoff that drives its CTR. The member palette (purple/gold/blue) and live-action bedroom framing also clash with the bright low-poly stickman city aesthetic, and without a satisfying crowd-growth moment in the first 3 seconds the hook fails to communicate the core loop. Only worth testing if rebuilt from scratch with Crowd City footage as the payoff after the bed-jump beat; do not adapt the existing creative.
